articles.headline: Marcelo Bielsa after World Cup exit: 'Left nothing' to Uruguay soccer
articles.description: Following Uruguay's group stage exit from the 2026 World Cup, a blunt Marcelo Bielsa conceded that he has "left nothing" to the national team during his time as their coach.

articles.headline: Spain win group but Yéremy Pino could miss rest of World Cup
articles.description: Spain coach Luis de la Fuente has confirmed that the team's qualification for the World Cup knockout stage -- topping Group H after a 1-0 win over Uruguay -- came at a cost, with injury concerns over wingers Nico Williams and Yéremy Pino.

images.caption: Spain's Yeremy Pino could miss the rest of the World Cup after suffering an injury against Uruguay.
images.alt: Yeremy Pino #11 of Spain reacts during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group H match between Uruguay and Spain at Guadalajara Stadium on June 26, 2026 in Zapopan, Mexico.

articles.headline: Socceroos Leckie, Italiano ruled out for the rest of the World Cup
articles.description: The Socceroos will play the remainder of their FIFA World Cup campaign with 24 players, after attacker Mathew Leckie and defender Jacob Italiano were ruled out of the tournament through injury.
